bridge_description_prefix:
Wrap XTM to create wXTM on Ethereum. wXTM isn't your
everyday Ethereum token anon. It's a powerful
bridge_description_suffix: that in future can exist on nearly any chain you desire.
bridge_one_way_notice:
Tari Bridge currently operates one way (XTM to wXTM). Tari contributors expect to launch wXTM unwrapping in July 2025 or sooner.
Having trouble?
connect_wallet_subtitle: This will be the destination for your wXTM
conversion_complete: Your {{toToken}} conversion has been complete and your funds have been deposited into the address specified.
how_to_view_wxtm_in_wallet: How to view wXTM in your wallet?
how_to_view_wxtm_step1_prefix: To see your balance, add wXTM to your wallet by importing the
how_to_view_wxtm_step2: to send the request directly to your mobile wallet app — you'll need to approve it on your phone.
pending_subtext: You'll receive {{amount}} {{fromToken}} in no more than {{bridgingTime}}. Funds are automatically transferred from your linked Tari Universe wallet. You don't need to do anything else.
please_connect_supported_network: Please connect to one of our supported networks to continue
processing_subtext: We've received your request. Your funds will be wrapped as soon as the process begins. No action is needed.
success_subtext: Your wXTM conversion has been complete and your funds have been deposited into the address specified.
timeout_subtext: We couldn't complete your wrapping request in time. Your XTM remains safe in your Tari wallet — it hasn't been deducted or moved.
timeout_title: Oops! Your transaction has timed out!
tokens_received_subtext: We've received your {{fromToken}}. Wrapping is queued and will begin shortly. You'll get wXTM at your Ethereum address once complete.
wrap_failed_message:
We couldn't complete your wrapping request in time.
Your XTM remains safe in your Tari wallet — it hasn't been deducted or moved.
start_bridging_to_view: Start bridging to view your transaction history here
